MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Aug-21-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication - Plaintiff's Motion for Summary Judgment is granted. Defendant failed to repay monies due under his agreement with Plaintiff. All records and statements show that Defendant applied to Plaintiff for a credit card account, entered into a written credit card account agreement with Plaintiff, and made purchases from this account. There is no evidence presented to this Court indicating that Defendant objected to any billing statement submitted by plaintiff as required under Civil Code section 1747.02 or U.S.C. section 1666 et seq. Defendant's sole contention that there is no proof Plaintiff American Express Centurion is not the "American Express entity" which he concedes "it is clear he owes" is meritless. GRANT plaintiff's request for judicial notice.Prevailing party to prepare a form of order and to comply with CCP 437 C(G). Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter : Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-15-2015 Continued To Sep-30-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
